success.description: True when the daemon finished this transcript successfully (agent loop completed in a good state). False on failure, cap, or invalid result; the host must not treat directives as valid to apply when false.

summary.description: Human-readable summary when the agent ends the loop (control_done); for host UI.

transcriptOutcome.description: Host UI hint: irrelevant transcripts vs normal completion. Omitted means completed (back-compat).

answerText.description: When transcriptOutcome=answer, the daemon returns a plain-text answer for the UI (no directives).

searchResults.description: When transcriptOutcome=search, the daemon returns a numbered list of search hits for voice navigation.

activeSearchIndex.description: 0-based active index into searchResults for next/back navigation.
